description: Input data for creating or updating a blog post
name: BlogPostInput

name.description: Internal name of the blog post

slug.description: URL slug for the blog post

postBody.description: HTML content of the blog post body

postSummary.description: Summary or excerpt of the blog post

blogAuthorId.description: ID of the associated blog author

contentGroupId.description: ID of the blog this post belongs to

featuredImageAltText.description: Alt text for the featured image

useFeaturedImage.description: Whether to display the featured image
